zh.lifeSummary: 當Avice Lascelles於大約1284年出生在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾瑟斯克時，她的父親Roger de Lascelles54歲，母親Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke58歲。她於1304年4月23日之前與Sir Robert Constable IV在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1356年5月9日在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁哈爾善姆享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Avice Lascelles于大约1284年出生在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾瑟斯克时，她的父亲Roger de Lascelles54岁，母亲Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke58岁。她于1304年4月23日之前与Sir Robert Constable IV在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1356年5月9日在英国英格兰越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁哈爾善姆享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lascelles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one of the large number of places in northern France called Celle, Celles, Lacelle, Leschelle, or Lachelle, all from French celle ‘hermitage’, and at different times occurring both with and without the plural -s.
Variant of   Lacelle   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Laswell
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Lascelles  . This surname is also found as   Lacefield  .

variants.name: Lacelle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Andre, Aurele, Benoit, Cecile, Marcel, Marie Paule.
Altered form of French Laselle: habitational name from La Selle, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Laselle is very rare in France, found in Marne. Compare Lascelles .

In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Lacelle in Corrèze or numerous minor places called La Celle, all named for a monastic cell or hermitage in their vicinity, from French celle ‘hermitage’.

nameMeanings.name: Avice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French form of the ancient Germanic name Aveza, derived from a short form of one or more compound names containing the first element av (as in Ava ; the meaning is uncertain). The correspondence in form to the Latin word avis ‘bird’ is coincidental.

en.lifeSummary: When Avice Lascelles was born about 1284, in Thirsk, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger de Lascelles, was 54 and her mother, Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke, was 58. She married Sir Robert Constable IV before 23 April 1304, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 9 May 1356, in Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

fr.Halsham, Yorkshire, England: Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Avice Lascelles est née environ 1284, à Thirsk, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Lascelles, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke, avait 58 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Constable IV avant 23 avril 1304, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 9 mai 1356, à Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Avice Lascelles um 1284 in Thirsk, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Lascelles 54 und ihre Mutter Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke 58. Sie hat vor 23. April 1304 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Robert Constable IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 9. Mai 1356 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Avice Lascelles è nata il circa 1284 nel Thirsk, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Roger de Lascelles, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke, aveva 58 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Constable IV prima del 23 aprile 1304, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Avice Lascellesが約1284年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアスイルスクで生まれた時，父Roger de Lascellesは54歳，母Isabel FitzThomas Greystokeは58歳であった。1304年4月23日以前にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir Robert Constable IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1356年5月9日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングハルシャムで73歳で死去した。

ko.Halsham, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 할샤
ko.lifeSummary: Avice Lascelles(이)가 대략 1284년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 스이르스크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Lascelles(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke(은)는 58세였다. 그녀는 1304년 4월 23일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Sir Robert Constable IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1356년 5월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 할샤에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Halsham, Yorkshire, England: холшам, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Avice Lascelles родилась около 1284 г. в местности тирск, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger de Lascelles было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke, 58. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Constable IV перед 23 апрель 1304 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 9 мая 1356 г. в местности холшам, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.
